prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低位次分别为约2178名→1914名→1853名→1777名→1720名，呈持续上升趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近5年累计前移约458名，2025年基 准位次约1720名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划：2021年9人、2022年9人、2023年9人、2024年12人、2025年15人、2026年17人，呈持续扩招态势，2 026年较2025年扩招约13.3%，扩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第49名，较2025年第52名上升3位，排名稳步提升， 反映学校综合实力增强；近年声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度评价为"一般"（总排名第94位），短视频曝光量中等；2023年曾出现投档线异常 信号（低关注），但未对后续年份产生持续负面影响；交通运输工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A，均为该校传统王牌学科，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在海南省招生专业以电气工程及其自动化、计算机类、电子信息类、交通运输类等工科为主，其中电气工程及其自动化2024年评为"高热推荐"，计算机 类持续"推荐"，电子信息/通信评为"高热推荐"，整体专业热度偏热；海南省考生总数从2021年52977人持续增长至2025年67408人，2026年预计约78000人（较2025年增长约15.7% ），考生规模大幅增加加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划扩招约13.3%、学校软科排名上升3位、本 省考生总数大幅增长约15.7%等因素，扩招与考生增加形成对冲，但考生增幅大于扩招幅度，预计竞争略有加剧。以，结合考生规模增加因素小 幅上调，预测2026年最低位次约1878名，区间1596–2160名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机类（包含专业：计算机科学与技术、软件工程）
- 电子信息类（包含专业：微电子科学与工程、电子科学与技术）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 交通运输类（包含专业：交通运输、交通工程）
- 人工智能
- 电子信息工程
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 机械类（包含专业：机械设计制造及其自动化、测控技术与仪器、工业工程）
- 车辆工程
- 能源动力类（包含专业：建筑环境与能源应用工程、能源与动力工程）
- 物流工程
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1878名，区间1596–2160名。位次在区间下限（1596名）附近可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（电气工程及其自动化、计算机类、电子信息类）；位次在预测值（1878名）附 近建议以二档为主（交通运输类、人工智能），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（2160名）附近建议以三档保底为主（机械类、车辆工程、能源动力类），稳妥填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Comprehensive category in Hainan Province were approximately 2178 → 1914 → 1853 → 1777 → 1720, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative advance of about 458 positions over the past 5 years, and a baseline ranking of approximately 1720 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Hainan Province for the Comprehensive category: 9 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 12 in 2024, 15 in 2025, and 17 in 2026, showing a continuous expansion trend, with an expansion of about 13.3% in 2026 compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 49th, up 3 places from 52nd in 2025, reflecting a steady improvement in overall strength; recent reputation evaluations are neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity rating is "average" (94th overall), with moderate short video exposure; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal in the admission score line (low attention), but it did not have a sustained negative impact on subsequent years; Transportation Engineering A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering A, both are traditional flagship disciplines of the university, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors in Hainan Province are mainly engineering fields such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Transportation. Among them, Electrical Engineering and Automation was rated as "highly recommended" in 2024, Computer Science continues to be "recommended", and Electronic Information/Communication is rated as "highly recommended", with overall major popularity leaning towards hot; the total number of examinees in Hainan Province has grown continuously from 52,977 in 2021 to 67,408 in 2025, and is expected to be about 78,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025), with a significant increase in the number of examinees intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by about 13.3%, the university's Soft Science ranking rising by 3 places, and the significant increase in the number of examinees in the province by about 15.7%, the expansion and the increase in examinees offset each other, but the growth rate of examinees is greater than the expansion rate, so competition is expected to slightly intensify. Therefore, with a slight upward adjustment due to the increase in the number of examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 1878, with a range of 1596–2160.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science (including: Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Electronic Information (including: Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Transportation (including: Transportation, Traffic Engineering)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Electronic Information Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical (including: Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Industrial Engineering)
- Vehicle Engineering
- Energy and Power (including: Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Logistics Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1878, range 1596–2160. For rankings near the lower limit of the range (1596), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science, Electronic Information); for rankings near the predicted value (1878), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2 majors (Transportation, Artificial Intelligence), while also considering Tier 1 as a reach; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (2160), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Mechanical, Vehicle Engineering, Energy and Power), and fill in the application form conservatively.
